revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata--> {{Infobox religious building|image=File:Aki-jinja, haisho-2.jpg|prefecture={{ill|Uda|qid=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}|coordinates={{Coord|34.47825|N|135.92397222222223|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
{{ill|Aki Shrine|ja|阿紀神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aki Shrine|qq=}} is a {{ill|Moto-Ise Shrines|lt=Motoise shrine|ja|元伊勢|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moto-Ise Shrines|qq=}}
Moto-Ise Shrines are {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} that used to host Amaterasu before she was moved to [[Ise Grand Shrine|Ise Jingu]]. The first one was {{ill|Hibara Shrine|ja|檜原神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hibara Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大神神社|1=Ōmiwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q705542}} ({{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|qid=Q705542|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine|1=Ōmiwa Shrine}}). ==Overview==
==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| <!--Aki Shrine--><!--Aki Shrine-->
}}
{{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} <!--removing this template because now we do not need it. All everybodywiki edit histories have been imported--> {{everybodywiki link|Aki Shrine}}
{{translated page|ja|阿紀神社|version=77836306|comment=Imported full ja history}} <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{Commons category|Aki-jinja}}
== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
'''Aki Shrine (Q11657607)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Uda District, Nara|en|Uda District, Nara|ja|宇陀郡|ar|يودا (اليابان)|ca|Districte d&#x27;Uda|ceb|Uda-gun|es|Distrito de Uda|fa|شهرستان اودا، نارا|fr|District d&#x27;Uda|id|Distrik Uda, Nara|it|Distretto di Uda|ko|우다군|nl|Uda (district)|pl|Powiat Uda|ru|Уда (уезд)|zh|宇陀郡|lt=Uda district|qid=Q1131315|1=Uda District, Nara}} || {{ill|Aki Shrine|lt=Aki Shrine|ja|阿紀神社|commons|Category:Aki-jinja|qid=Q11657607|1=Aki Shrine}} || {{ill|Kanpei-sha|qid=Q135160338|lt=Kanpei|comment=categorized|1=Kanpei-sha}} ({{ill|Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver|qid=Q135009152|lt=Hoe and Quiver|1=Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver}}) || {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} || — || — || {{coord|34.478372|135.924053|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180762 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11657607}} [[da:d:Q11657607]] [[ja:阿紀神社]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Hoe and Quiver]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Moto-Ise shrines]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Uda, Nara]] [[Category:History of Uda, Nara]]
